ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product (in case of bundles) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product ordered */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., ground, air) */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipping */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the tax rate applies */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate as a percentage */,
  "tax_type" TEXT /* Type of tax (e.g., sales tax, VAT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the product in the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bundles" (
  "bundle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bundle */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the bundle */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the bundle */,
  "bundle_name" TEXT /* Name of the bundle */,
  "bundle_description" TEXT /* Description of the bundle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bundle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bundles_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_alt_text" TEXT /* Alt text for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "catalogs" (
  "catalog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each catalog */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the catalog */,
  "catalog_name" TEXT /* Name of the catalog */,
  "catalog_description" TEXT /* Description of the catalog */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the catalog was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catalog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_catalogs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlists" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wishlist */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the wishlist */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product on the wishlist */,
  "add_date" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the wishlist */,
  "remove_date" TEXT /* Date the product was removed from the wishlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the cart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the cart */,
  "add_date" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the cart */,
  "remove_date" TEXT /* Date the product was removed from the cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coupons" (
  "coupon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coupon */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Code for the coupon */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of the discount */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the coupon expires */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the coupon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coupon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_coupons" (
  "order_coupon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order coupon */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the coupon was applied to */,
  "coupon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coupon applied */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_coupon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_coupons_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_coupons_coupon_id FOREIGN KEY ("coupon_id") REFERENCES coupons ("coupon_id")
)
